title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre: Unsolved
description: In the summer of 1973, a few miles outside of Austin, Texas, five youths were attacked in a grisly and gruesome fashion by an unidentified madman. Go on a journey into one of Texas’s most famous unsolved murders.
quote: There’s an image in my mind that’ll never go away.
altHero: newspaper story about the murders with a photo of a house
alt1: an old photograph of the young friends
alt3: diagram of a woman with red and black marker annotations
alt4: survivor Sally Hardesty, now an old woman
